creator: galaluk@gmail.com
text:
We have a DELL PowedEdge 2950 that embedded Broadcom® NetXtreme II 5708
Gigabit Ethernet NIC.

When we try to install something on it, it will suddenly disconnect till we
reboot that.

Ther error message is : bce0: /usr/src/sys/dev/bce/if_bce.c(4644): Error
mapping mbuf into TX chain!
